raw_consumer_statement: American Express has failed to legally investigate and process my dispute. I have reopened numerous times with no legal reasons described as accurate by the laws governing such decline reasons for over two years. I finally received another credit after investigation letter in the mail on XX/XX/XXXX. It was dated XX/XX/XXXX and stated the credit would be final after XX/XX/XXXX with no new documentation to reopen. I had chatted on XX/XX/XXXX and was told I was declined so I reopened. When I got the letter of credit, I also got a reopen and decline again for XX/XX/XXXX. The Merchant said temporary credit only based on their contact with AE on XX/XX/XXXX. This is not in time and I was told I was the only one who reopened therefore I should have full final credit. American Express fails to supply declining documentation to dispute a full refund. I do not except same old disproven XXXX responses from a scamming merchant. Please refund asap.
